query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'blog_categories' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'blog_categories' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	COLUMN_TYPE
id	int	int(11)
name	varchar	varchar(100)
slug	varchar	varchar(100)
description	text	text
sortOrder	int	int(11)
createdAt	bigint	bigint(20)
